qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Arbitrary file read via fallback path resolution bypass in render/include/layout tags
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same LiquidJS render/include/layout file resolution fallback root cause as the advisory: Loader.candidates() yields fs.fallback()/require.resolve() results without enforcing fs.contains() root containment.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Quadratic-time ReDoS via strip_html filter on crafted input with many angle brackets
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns regex backtracking in the strip_html filter, not the advisory's fallback path resolution/root containment bypass in render/include/layout file loading.

selected_finding.title: Arbitrary file read via fallback path resolution bypass in render/include/layout tags

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the advisory root cause and the copied PoC demonstrates the advisory impact: LiquidJS rendered an absolute path outside the configured template root through the fallback resolver and returned /etc/passwd content.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-wmfp-5q7x-987x states the root cause is LiquidJS allowing require.resolve() as fallback without limiting directories it can resolve to.
Finding report cites src/fs/loader.ts yielding fs.fallback(file) without fs.contains() checks and src/fs/fs-impl.ts using require.resolve(file, { paths: ['.'] }).

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_0cf65701/.judge/poc_runs/path-traversal-fallback-bypass/run.log shows LiquidJS created with root /app/safe-templates, then attempted {% render "/etc/passwd" %}.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_0cf65701/.judge/poc_runs/path-traversal-fallback-bypass/run.log shows rendered output beginning with root:x:0:0 and EXPLOIT VERIFIED: /etc/passwd content successfully read through path traversal.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_0cf65701/.judge/poc_runs/path-traversal-fallback-bypass/poc_execution.json records the final copied-workspace execution exit_code 0 and timed_out false.

poc_executions.observed_effect: After an environment-only fix in the copied workspace, the PoC rendered {% render "/etc/passwd" %} with Liquid root set to /app/safe-templates and returned /etc/passwd content including root:x:0:0.
